testcase.name: test_operador_visibility_filter

failure.message: AssertionError: operador leaking OS disciplina=instrumentacao: 8743d427-44fb-4b18-a1e8-a0e43093b190 assert 'instrumentacao' not in {'eletrica', 'instrumentacao', 'mecanica'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration52_central.py:90: in test_operador_visibility_filter assert disc not in forbidden, f"operador leaking OS disciplina={disc}: {o.get('numero_os') or o.get('id')}" E AssertionError: operador leaking OS disciplina=instrumentacao: 8743d427-44fb-4b18-a1e8-a0e43093b190 E assert 'instrumentacao' not in {'eletrica', 'instrumentacao', 'mecanica'}
